creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
alepulver    2008-08-13 03:00:56 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/ntfsprogs   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    sysutils/ntfsprogs/files patch-libntfs-unix_io.c 
                             patch-ntfsprogs-Makefile.in 
                             pkg-message.in 
  Added files:
    sysutils/ntfsprogs/files README.FreeBSD 
                             patch-libntfs-device_io.c 
  Log:
  - Update to version 2.0.0 with write support, add README partially mirrored
    from similar port sysutils/fusefs-ntfs (other parts taken as well).
  - Update pkg-descr and pkg-message.
  
  PR:             ports/126439
  Approved by:    miwi
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
